description: Part 3 - Intelligence Engines (Energy Resolution Framework, Belief Engine, Senseei Meta-Intelligence). Ports the EDE/RE/EAE energy framework, the 6-belief simultaneous belief engine, physics observation layer, hypothesis engine, prediction engine, wave intelligence (similarity scoring, convexity maturity, wave progress), and the Senseei meta-intelligence layer (alignment/contradiction/threat/confidence/timing/intent/opportunity/action) from F16 V70 and Letra 37 into MQL5.
steps: Implement Physics Observation Layer: velocityScore, accelerationScore, convexityScore, obs_ExpansionScore, obs_DecayScore, obs_CurvatureScore, obs_AbsorptionScore, obs_LiquidityScore, physicsMax, physicsDiff, physicsConsensus - all computed from the M5 structure engine physics outputs

Implement Energy Dissipation Engine (EDE): ede_state mapping from canonical phase (1=accumulating through 6=resolving), ede_expansionEnergy (from obs_ExpansionScore + impulse), ede_dissipatedEnergy (accumulates through pre-conv/induction/liquidation), ede_dissipationProgress (0-100 across 4 stages)

Implement Resolution Engine (RE): re_expectedCycles, re_completedCycles, re_recursiveCompletionScore, re_residualEnergy, re_objectiveReached, re_fullDissipation, re_resolutionState (RESOLVED/PARTIALLY_RESOLVED/UNRESOLVED), re_residualEnergyScore, re_revisitProbability
Implement Energy Attractor Engine (EAE): eae_primaryAttractorPrice (flipzone for unresolved, origin for partial), eae_primaryAttractorScore, eae_primaryAttractorLabel, eae_energyState

Implement Wave Intelligence similarity scoring: f_idealSim() computing Euclidean distance in 4D normalized physics space, compute sim_Expansion/PreConv/Induction/Liquidity/Creation/Absorption/Retracement/DemandReturn
Implement Convexity Maturity Engine: expWeaknessScore, inductionMatScore, liqMatScore, rawConvexityMaturity with EMA smoothing
Implement Wave Progress estimation: geometry-based progress + physics-based progress (similarity anchor + convexity weight), EMA smoothed waveProgress 0-100

Implement Belief Engine: 6 simultaneous raw beliefs (expansion, convexity, creation, absorption, retracement, demandReturn) each with position-multiplier gating, then EMA smoothed into persistent belief state

Implement Hypothesis Engine: hyp_LateExpansion, hyp_TerminalConvexity, hyp_CreationForming, hyp_AbsorptionActive, hyp_RetracementActive, hyp_DemandReturn - each normalized to 0-100 with model-fit multiplier
Implement Prediction Engine: predScore for each phase (Expansion/Convexity/Creation/Absorption/Retracement/DemandReturn), expectedNextPhase selection, expectedNextProb scoring

Implement Senseei Meta-Intelligence (from F16): compute master direction from 4 voters (waveDir, stackDir, netBias, pressureDir), alignment/conflict/threat/confidence/timing/intent/opportunity/action scores, final actionState (ATTACK/PREPARE/MANAGE/WAIT)

Implement the liquidation wave overlay (Engine 1A.7): liqg_active tracking, distance compression, objective arrival detection (structure+momentum+physics), true CHoCH gate, sub-phase classification (Initialization/Push/Displacement/Induction/TerminalLiquidation/ObjectiveArrival)
acceptance_criteria: All 3 ERF sub-engines (EDE, RE, EAE) are implemented with correct state transitions
6 belief scores are computed with position-aware multipliers and EMA smoothing
Wave progress combines geometric + physics-based estimation
Liquidation wave overlay tracks objective arrival with triple-confirmation
verification: Read the output file and verify ERF state machine matches Letra specification
Verify all 6 beliefs have position multipliers and EMA smoothing
Check Senseei produces the 4 key voters and 8 meta-scores
findings: File created at 1529 lines. All braces/parens/brackets balanced (code-only check). Contains: 3 input params, Physics Observation Layer (11 global scores), EDE (6-state machine from canonical phase), RE (resolution states with recursive completion), EAE (primary attractor from flipzone/origin based on resolution state), Wave Intelligence (8 similarity scores via 4D Euclidean distance), Convexity Maturity (3 sub-scores with EMA), Wave Progress (geometry 60% + physics similarity anchor 40% with EMA), Belief Engine (6 beliefs with position-multiplier gating and EMA smoothing), Hypothesis Engine (6 hypotheses normalized to 0-100 with model-fit multiplier), Prediction Engine (6 phase scores with max selection), Liquidation Wave Overlay (6 sub-phases, triple-confirmation arrival, true CHoCH gate), Senseei Meta-Intelligence (4 voters: M5 dir + fractal stack + HTF consensus + STF pressure, producing alignment/conflict/threat/confidence/timing/intent/opportunity/action). Master update function Intel_UpdateAll() calls all 12 sub-engines in correct dependency order. No OnInit/OnTick/OnDeinit. References from Part 2: g_se[], g_fractalStackDir, g_fractalStackScore, SE_ComputeATR, TF_M5/M1/M3/M15/H4, InpSE_* params. References from Part 1: GetATR(). The 4th Senseei voter (pressureDir) is simplified from F16's invisible network node authority scoring to M1+M3 directional consensus as a more portable MQL5 approach.
